revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-1-110

Isocandela Line (U.S.A.)

A curve traced on an imaginary sphere with the source at its centre and joining all the points corresponding to those directions in which the luminous intensity is the same, or a plane projection of this curve.

Reference: C.I.E.


Note: This type of diagram is sometimes used instead of the curve of luminous intensity distribution.

{{IALAFooter}}
